title: heliophila roggeveldensis
intro: Heliophila roggeveldensis, also known as the Roggeveld hairy crinkle-cress, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. Heliophila roggeveldensis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in modern medicine.
